label: L3 Fixed (no trajectory uncertainty)
description: Freezes every L3 (trajectory) growth parameter at its mode/mean. No draws on 2075 CAV/STI targets, on the EV-share or low-carbon-electricity growth exponents, on the efficiency doubling time, or on the fleet-stock growth exponent. Useful to see how narrow the uncertainty band becomes when all trajectory divergence is removed (isolates L1+L2 contribution).

notes.retire_year_excluded: retire_year is an L2 parameter and is not frozen by this L3 preset.
notes.scope: Fixes all truly trajectory-shaping parameters: 2075 CAV target, 2075 STI target, ev growth, clean_energy growth, efficiency_doubling, total_car_increase.
